'''narungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graaf|graaf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graaf|graaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| narungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næringith|næringith]] || [[word:næringij|næringij]] || [[word:næringish|næringish]] || [[word:næringi|næringi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:narurunguth|narurunguth]] || [[word:narurunguj|narurunguj]] || [[word:narurungush|narurungush]] || [[word:narurungu|narurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:narunguth|narunguth]] || [[word:narunguj|narunguj]] || [[word:narungush|narungush]] || [[word:narungu|narungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:narufnguth|narufnguth]] || [[word:narufnguj|narufnguj]] || [[word:narufngush|narufngush]] || [[word:narufnguf|narufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:narunguthu|narunguthu]] || [[word:narunguju|narunguju]] || [[word:narungushu|narungushu]] || [[word:narunguku|narunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:narunguth|narunguth]] || [[word:narunguj|narunguj]] || [[word:narungush|narungush]] || [[word:narungu|narungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:narunguthul|narunguthul]] || [[word:narungujul|narungujul]] || [[word:narungushul|narungushul]] || [[word:narungukul|narungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:narunguthuthu|narunguthuthu]] || [[word:narungujuju|narungujuju]] || [[word:narungushushu|narungushushu]] || [[word:narunguku|narunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:narunguthun|narunguthun]] || [[word:narungujun|narungujun]] || [[word:narungushun|narungushun]] || [[word:narungukun|narungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:narunguthuoro|narunguthuoro]] || [[word:narungujuoro|narungujuoro]] || [[word:narungushuoro|narungushuoro]] || [[word:narungukuoro|narungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
